narrative:
Hunting Valley City has 575 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.3 percentage points.
